title: Risk-sensitive escalation
client_message: I’m not sure I want to be here anymore and I’ve been thinking about hurting myself when things get too heavy.
objective: Recognize risk, screen appropriately, and escalate or safety plan.
success_criteria: Escalates or creates a safety plan when needed

forbidden_phrases: promise me you will not do it

title: Handle resistance without losing rapport
client_message: I don’t think talking about this helps. Everyone keeps asking me the same questions and it’s annoying.
objective: Respond to resistance, preserve rapport, and still clarify the problem.
success_criteria: Uses a probing question that keeps the conversation moving

title: Complex formulation and planning
client_message: Work stress, family conflict, and sleep problems are all feeding into each other, and I’m not sure where to start.
objective: Formulate the interacting problems, summarize them, and set a realistic next step.
success_criteria: Connects multiple issues into one coherent summary
Ends with a concrete goal and home practice

forbidden_phrases: you should be able to handle this
